Dispatch Optimisation — Run Report

Run metadata

Label Test
Date 2026-03-17
Description Initial test run of quarto report setup with 2 gensets and 4-day load profile.
Git hash 252b333fa85cff7ffefc3b17d691b74a6d862ccd ⚠ uncommitted changes
Solver status OPTIMAL
Objective (g fuel) 7,911,689.2
Solve time 0.26 s

Model formulation

The unit commitment and economic dispatch problem is formulated as a mixed-integer linear program (MILP).

Sets

  • \(\mathcal{G}\) — generators; \(\mathcal{T}\) — timesteps; \(I_g\) — SFOC breakpoints for generator \(g\)

Decision variables

Variable Domain Description
\(u_{g,t}\) \(\{0,1\}\) Commitment status
\(P_{g,t}\) \(\geq 0\) Power output [kW]
\(\lambda_{g,t,i}\) \([0,1]\) SOS2 interpolation weights
\(P^{ch}_t,\, P^{dis}_t\) \(\geq 0\) Battery charge / discharge power [kW]
\(E_t\) \([E^{min}, E^{max}]\) Stored energy [kWh]
\(z_t\) \(\{0,1\}\) Charge mutex (\(1\) = charging)
\(s_t\) \(\geq 0\) SOC deviation auxiliary

Objective — minimise total fuel flow plus SOC deviation penalty

\[ \min \sum_{g,t,i} \lambda_{g,t,i}\, f_{g,i}\, P_{g,i} \;+\; \lambda_{\text{soc}} \sum_{t} s_t \]

Subject to

Power balance: \[\sum_{g} P_{g,t} + P^{dis}_t - P^{ch}_t = D_t \qquad \forall\, t\]

Generator limits and SOS2 piecewise-linear SFOC: \[ P^{min}_g\, u_{g,t} \leq P_{g,t} \leq P^{max}_g\, u_{g,t} \] \[ \sum_i \lambda_{g,t,i} = u_{g,t},\quad P_{g,t} = \sum_i \lambda_{g,t,i} P_{g,i},\quad f_{g,t} = \sum_i \lambda_{g,t,i} f_{g,i},\quad (\lambda_{g,t,\cdot}) \in \text{SOS2} \]

Battery energy evolution and mutual exclusion: \[ E_{t+1} = E_t + \Delta t\!\left(\eta^{ch} P^{ch}_t - \tfrac{1}{\eta^{dis}} P^{dis}_t\right) \] \[ P^{dis}_t \leq z_t\, P^{dis,max}, \qquad P^{ch}_t \leq (1 - z_t)\, P^{ch,max} \]

Terminal SOC constraint: \[E_{|T|+1} \geq \text{SOC}^{ref} \cdot E^{max}\]

SOC deviation linearisation (\(\|SOC_t - SOC^{ref}\|\) via epigraph): \[ s_t \geq \tfrac{E_t}{E^{max}} - \text{SOC}^{ref}, \qquad s_t \geq \text{SOC}^{ref} - \tfrac{E_t}{E^{max}} \]

Symmetry breaking (identical generators): \[P_{g,t} \geq P_{g+1,t} \qquad \forall\, g < |\mathcal{G}|,\, t\]

Battery

Parameter Value
Capacity \(E^{max}\) 940 kWh
